auth.label: Personal Access Token
auth.description: Capsule CRM personal access token sent as Authorization: Bearer <token>. Create one from Capsule account settings.

actions.name: create_opportunity
actions.description: Create a Capsule CRM opportunity.

opportunity.description: The Capsule CRM opportunity payload to send.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for writing a Capsule CRM opportunity.

outputSchema.description: The created Capsule CRM opportunity response.

actions.name: create_party
actions.description: Create a Capsule CRM party.

party.description: The Capsule CRM party payload to send.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for writing a Capsule CRM party.

outputSchema.description: The created Capsule CRM party response.

actions.name: create_task
actions.description: Create a Capsule CRM task.

task.description: The Capsule CRM task payload to send.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for writing a Capsule CRM task.

outputSchema.description: The created Capsule CRM task response.

actions.name: delete_opportunity
actions.description: Delete a Capsule CRM opportunity.

id.description: The unique Capsule CRM opportunity ID.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for deleting one Capsule CRM record.

deleted.description: Whether Capsule CRM accepted the delete request.

outputSchema.description: The delete action result.

actions.name: delete_party
actions.description: Delete a Capsule CRM party.

id.description: The unique Capsule CRM party ID.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for deleting one Capsule CRM record.

deleted.description: Whether Capsule CRM accepted the delete request.

outputSchema.description: The delete action result.

actions.name: delete_task
actions.description: Delete a Capsule CRM task.

id.description: The unique Capsule CRM task ID.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for deleting one Capsule CRM record.

deleted.description: Whether Capsule CRM accepted the delete request.

outputSchema.description: The delete action result.

actions.name: get_current_user
actions.description: Read the Capsule CRM user associated with the access token.

items.description: One related resource name to embed.

embed.description: Additional related resources to embed in the Capsule CRM response.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for reading the current Capsule CRM user.

outputSchema.description: The current Capsule CRM user response.

actions.name: get_opportunity
actions.description: Read one Capsule CRM opportunity by ID.

id.description: The unique Capsule CRM opportunity ID.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for reading one Capsule CRM record.

outputSchema.description: The Capsule CRM opportunity response.

actions.name: get_party
actions.description: Read one Capsule CRM party by ID.

id.description: The unique Capsule CRM party ID.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for reading one Capsule CRM record.

actions.description: Read one Capsule CRM task by ID.

id.description: The unique Capsule CRM task ID.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for reading one Capsule CRM record.

outputSchema.description: The Capsule CRM task response.

actions.name: list_categories
actions.description: List Capsule CRM task categories.

page.description: The page number of results to return.

perPage.description: The number of records to return per page.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for listing Capsule CRM task categories.

items.description: One Capsule CRM record from the API response.

categories.description: The Capsule CRM categories returned by the API.

pagination.description: Pagination metadata from Capsule CRM response headers.

outputSchema.description: The Capsule CRM categories list response.

actions.name: list_countries
actions.description: List countries supported by Capsule CRM.

inputSchema.description: This action does not require any input.

items.description: One Capsule CRM record from the API response.

countries.description: The Capsule CRM countries returned by the API.

pagination.description: Pagination metadata from Capsule CRM response headers.

outputSchema.description: The Capsule CRM countries list response.

actions.name: list_currencies

currencies.description: The Capsule CRM currencies returned by the API.

pagination.description: Pagination metadata from Capsule CRM response headers.

outputSchema.description: The Capsule CRM currencies list response.

actions.name: list_opportunities
actions.description: List Capsule CRM opportunities with pagination, optional change filtering, and embeds.

page.description: The page number of results to return.

perPage.description: The number of records to return per page.

since.description: Only include records changed after this ISO 8601 timestamp.

items.description: One related resource name to embed.

embed.description: Additional related resources to embed in the Capsule CRM response.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for listing Capsule CRM opportunities.

items.description: One Capsule CRM record from the API response.

opportunities.description: The Capsule CRM opportunities returned by the API.

pagination.description: Pagination metadata from Capsule CRM response headers.

outputSchema.description: The Capsule CRM opportunities list response.
